strengths: Clear identification of three distinct real-world objects with specific contexts
Explicit links drawn between each object and the prompt on inevitable bias
Most claims are supported with cited sources, demonstrating TOK concept integration
weaknesses: Explanations sometimes lack precision and depth, with occasional unsupported assertions
Organisational issues such as fragmented sentences, broken captions and a missing conclusion
Overreliance on secondary statements in the ChatGPT analysis and uneven justification across objects
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The submission demonstrates solid achievement in identifying three specific objects, situating them in real-world contexts and explicitly linking each to the IA prompt about bias. Evidence is generally cited and key TOK concepts are integrated, placing the work in the 5â6 band. However, recurring precision issues (e.g., conflating bias concepts), uneven depth of analysis, organisational lapses (missing conclusion, formatting inconsistencies) and occasional unsupported claims prevent it from reaching the upper band of this level. Awarding 5 marks reflects a fair placement in the lower half of the band, in line with the official total.

annotations.comment: The prompt is clearly stated, framing the exploration of bias in knowledge production effectively and ensuring focus throughout the exhibition.
The exhibition title is descriptive but could explicitly reference the selected IA prompt to strengthen alignment with the requirement.
Consider including a brief preview of object contexts on the cover sheet to orient the reader immediately and improve overall coherence.
The introduction articulates the exhibition's aim but repeats phrases and lacks explicit reference to the prompt wording, weakening focus at the outset.
The caption precisely identifies the location of the Penicillium mold, fulfilling the requirement to state real-world contexts clearly.
The source link relies on a Wikipedia page; replacing this with a peer-reviewed or primary source would strengthen the credibility of the exhibit.
The conflation of âno hypothesisâ with âno biasâ oversimplifies methodological bias; consider discussing how unintentional biases can arise in observational discoveries.
Citing the American Chemical Society provides credibility; integrate more diverse sources or first-hand accounts to deepen the scholarly foundation.
To deepen the TOK analysis, explicitly connect this object to concepts such as confirmation bias and the role of chance in hypothesis formation.
The object heading clearly identifies the Gutenberg press and its location, satisfying the requirement for specific real-world context.
The description of Gutenbergâs invention remains largely descriptive; expand on how power structures and information control introduce bias in printed knowledge.
Integrate a TOK framework termâsuch as âauthorityâ or âperspectiveââto analyze how the printing press shaped epistemic access.
The analysis acknowledges both democratization and introduction of bias through the press operators, demonstrating balanced evaluation of bias inevitability.
The claim about language barriers underrepresenting other cultures needs specific historical examples or references to substantiate this epistemic bias.
Consider citing specific casesâsuch as the suppression of non-Latin textsâto illustrate cultural biases in early printing.
Including a UI screenshot of ChatGPT adds noise and distracts from the TOK analysis; focusing on descriptive text of the object would improve clarity.
The object description clearly states how ChatGPT inherits biases from training data, aligning well with the chosen prompt.
Deepen analysis by applying concepts like âalgorithmic biasâ and âdata stewardshipâ, rather than moral assessments of AI developers.
The discussion of AI bias in criminal justice is relevant but would benefit from explicit TOK terminology (e.g., 'implications for truth and ethics').
The sentence suggests AIâs knowledge will be unbiased despite context arguing bias is inevitable; revise this phrasing to resolve contradiction.
The conclusion section is missing, so the exhibition ends abruptly without summarizing how all objects collectively address the prompt.
The bibliography includes relevant sources, demonstrating research breadth, but formatting is inconsistent across entries.
Several entries lack retrieval dates and proper APA formatting; ensure uniform citation style and completeness to strengthen scholarly rigour.
The Printivity source entry is incomplete, missing author initials and publication date format; revise to match APA guidelines.
Consider including a final reflective statement in the bibliography to connect your sources back to your TOK analysis, deepening the meta-analysis component.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
